title: Rogue Heir of Elethorn
imageAlt: HeroQuest: Rogue Heir of Elethorn Box

description.paragraph: "HeroQuest: Rogue Heir of Elethorn" is an expansion for the classic board game HeroQuest. Independent, but loyal to the monarch, The Rogue Heir of Elethorn is a nimble skirmisher deadly with small blades.

contents.introduction: The "HeroQuest: Rogue Heir of Elethorn" includes the following components:
